meaning: adj.态度的,根据(或表示)个人态度的
examples: Does such an attitudinal change reflect real experiences in daily life?
Attitudinal warmth is considered very polite in the Chinese culture.
The following sample questions asked by applicants reflect a decidedly different attitudinal bent.
And that was confirmed by the attitudinal studies that was done prior to this vote.
This choice symbolizes an attitudinal challenge to war as a normal function of statecraft.
